---
output: 
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true

pagetitle: Josh Leon - BIOL 3100 Final
---
<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 1800px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
</style>

## [Home](http://JLEON123.github.io) | [Portfolio](http://JLEON123.github.io/portfolio/index.html)

</div>

<br>

<style>
div.brown { color:#ffffff; text-align:left; background-color:#a89d82; border-radius: 20px; padding: 20px;}
</style>
<div class = "brown">

# **Analyzing the Microbiome of Mangrove Samples**  
___


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
